hero.name: Ander Akier Ayucar Chasco
hero.headline: Junior Data Engineer & Data Analyst
hero.headlineHighlight: Python · SQL · Power BI · Machine Learning
hero.tagline: I turn complex data into useful solutions. Real industry experience (Michelin). Available for immediate start.
hero.profileImageAlt: Profile photo of Ander Akier Ayucar Chasco

about.intro: Computer Engineer with hands-on experience in data analysis, data engineering and Machine Learning in a real industrial environment (Michelin). I specialise in turning complex data into useful solutions: from building ETL pipelines to developing predictive models and interactive dashboards.
about.paragraph2: I work mainly with Python, SQL, Power BI and Dataiku, and I am comfortable on both the data side and the software development side. International experience through Erasmus in the Czech Republic (Universita Pardubice, 2024–2025).
about.paragraph3: Currently finishing my Bachelor's thesis on membrane burst prediction with ML at Michelin — a project with real industrial data, feature engineering and predictive modelling. Defence scheduled for June 2026.

items.description: Company internship at Michelin's factory in Aranda de Duero, combined with Bachelor's thesis development.
bullets: Development of data pipelines and ETL workflow automation using Python, Dataiku and PySpark on large-scale industrial production data
Exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis of manufacturing data to detect patterns and anomalies
Building and validating ML models for fault prediction (predictive maintenance) with Scikit-learn
Creation of Power BI dashboards for KPI monitoring and anomaly detection in production
Collaborative teamwork under Agile/SCRUM methodology in a real production environment

items.description: Industrial production line work with quality control of automotive components.
bullets: Quality control of automotive components on industrial production line

tfg.title: Membrane Burst Prediction System
tfg.subtitle: Bachelor's Thesis — Michelin
tfg.description: Development of an early-warning system for curing presses at Michelin's factory in Aranda de Duero, using real industrial production data.
bullets: Feature engineering on complex industrial variables
Model training and cross-validation (Random Forest, XGBoost)
Key result: more than 50% reduction in false positives compared to the previous method
tfg.confidentialNote: Code is confidential under agreement with Michelin — real industrial data

degree.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering
degree.tfgTitle: Membrane Burst Prediction via Data Analysis and Machine Learning
degree.tfgNote: Developed at Michelin (Aranda de Duero) with real industrial data. Defence scheduled June 2026.
